title: serratula coronata var. koreana
intro: Serratula coronata var. koreana, also known as the Korean milk thistle or Korean hedge thistle, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, alleviating liver and kidney issues, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Serratula coronata var. koreana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
